_how_to_edit: Update this file weekly (GitHub web editor works). 'deals': the funding rounds you want to highlight, in your own words. 'category' is one of: Venture, Private Equity, Funds, People. 'videos'/'articles': your picks of the week. Save = site auto-redeploys.

deals.investors: Portage, Wellington, Crosslink Capital, 53 Stations, Titanium Ventures
Anamcara, Concrete VC, Love Ventures, Portfolio Ventures
deals.note: London-based AI procurement platform for construction firms.
First fund, focused on middle-market services, industrials, and consumer.
